core_mechanism: an advection-diffusion (convection-diffusion) transport equation for a conserved scalar, in which the flux combines isotropic diffusion with directional advection by an underlying flow field, and a dimensionless Peclet number sets the crossover between diffusion-dominated and advection-dominated transport
brief_reason: The abstract reformulates the heat flux to add directional enthalpy transport carried by blood flow on top of thermal diffusion and defines a (biological) Peclet number quantifying directional transport relative to diffusion, which is precisely the advection-diffusion transport structure governed by a Peclet number.
